Bash(/usr/local/bin/gh release create v11.4 /tmp/wine-jack-11.4-macos-x86_64.tar.xz --repo Valerio357/wine-jack --title "Wine-Jack 11.4" --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Wine-Jack 11.4 — First Build

Custom Wine 11.4 build for Jack, based on [GCenx Wine]\(https://github.com/Gcenx/wine\).

### Build Configuration
- **Base**: Wine 11.4 \(GCenx fork with macOS support\)
- **Architectures**: x86_64 + i386 \(PE multi-arch\)
- **Platform**: macOS \(Apple Silicon via Rosetta 2\)
- **Vulkan**: MoltenVK
- **GStreamer**: 1.28.1
- **OpenGL**: X11 libGL

### What's included
- `wine` binary \(unified multi-arch loader\)
- `wineserver`
- All builtin DLLs \(ntdll, kernel32, wined3d, winevulkan, winemac.drv, etc.\)
- Wine tools \(wineboot, winecfg, regedit, winedbg, etc.\)

### Installation
```bash
tar -xJf wine-jack-11.4-macos-x86_64.tar.xz
export PATH=$PWD/wine-jack-11.4/bin:$PATH
wine --version  # wine-11.4
```

### Next: Phase 2 patches
- steamwebhelper --no-sandbox support
- ntdll syscall thunks for Chromium/CEF
- chrome_elf.dll version check bypass
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add dependency manager, fix Keychain prompts, improve error handling

- Add DependencyManager to check/install Python, pip packages, SteamCMD, Mono at launch
- Extend setup flow with dependency install step after Wine setup
- Switch Keychain to Data Protection Keychain \(no more password prompts\)
- Auto-migrate legacy Keychain items on first read
- Fix jacksteam.py crash on HTTP 429 \(UnicodeDecodeError in error handler\)
- Improve SteamNativeService error reporting \(show stderr instead of generic exit code\)
- Remove JackSteamBridge \(replaced by jacksteam.py\)
- Clean up unused files from JackCloudSync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh release create v0.2.0-beta /tmp/Jack-beta.dmg --repo Valerio357/jack --target dev --title "v0.2.0 Beta Preview" --prerelease --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Jack v0.2.0 Beta Preview

### What's New
- **Dependency Manager**: Automatic detection and installation of all runtime dependencies \(Python, Steam library, SteamCMD, Mono\) at first launch
- **Two separate login interfaces**: Steam Account \(library/cloud\) and SteamCMD \(downloads\) can now be authenticated independently — no more 2FA code conflicts
- **Full game library**: All owned games now show in the library \(268+ titles via PICS license resolution\), even with private Steam profiles
- **Keychain fix**: No more macOS password prompts on every launch \(migrated to Data Protection Keychain\)
- **Better error messages**: Login failures now show the actual error instead of generic "exit 1"

### Removed
- JackSteamBridge \(replaced by jacksteam.py\)
- Unused JackCloudSync files \(main.c, steamcloud.py, test_steam.py\)

### Requirements
- macOS 14.0+
- Apple Silicon \(arm64\)
- Homebrew recommended \(for auto-installing Python/Mono\)

> ⚠️ This is a beta preview. SteamCMD credential caching and game installation are still being tested.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(gh release edit v0.2.0-beta --repo Valerio357/jack --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Jack v0.2.0 Beta Preview

### Installation
After downloading, if macOS blocks the app:
```bash
xattr -cr /Applications/Jack.app
```
Or: Right-click Jack.app → Open → Open \(bypasses Gatekeeper once\).

### What's New
- **Dependency Manager**: Automatic detection and installation of all runtime dependencies \(Python, Steam library, SteamCMD, Mono\) at first launch
- **Two separate login interfaces**: Steam Account \(library/cloud\) and SteamCMD \(downloads\) can now be authenticated independently — no more 2FA code conflicts
- **Full game library**: All owned games now show in the library \(268+ titles via PICS license resolution\), even with private Steam profiles
- **Keychain fix**: No more macOS password prompts on every launch \(migrated to Data Protection Keychain\)
- **Better error messages**: Login failures now show the actual error instead of generic "exit 1"

### Removed
- JackSteamBridge \(replaced by jacksteam.py\)
- Unused JackCloudSync files

### Requirements
- macOS 14.0+
- Apple Silicon \(arm64\)
- Homebrew recommended \(for auto-installing Python/Mono\)

> ⚠️ This is a beta preview. SteamCMD credential caching and game installation are still being tested.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Apple GPTK \(D3DMetal\) as dual Wine engine

Integrates Apple Game Porting Toolkit 3.0 alongside CrossOver Wine,
giving users a per-game choice between CrossOver \(WineD3D/DXVK\) and
GPTK \(D3DMetal\) for DirectX 11/12 translation directly to Metal.

- Add GPTKInstaller: downloads GPTK 3.0-3 from GitHub, installs to app support
- Add WineEngine enum \(crossover/gptk\) to BottleSettings, persisted per-bottle
- Wine.swift: all process launching uses bottle's selected engine binary and lib paths
- DXVK auto-disabled when GPTK selected; renderer picker hidden for GPTK
- Engine switching runs wineboot to regenerate correct built-in DLLs
- Setup flow installs both Wine engines as required dependencies
- Update README with new architecture, engine stack table, and dependency list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh release create v0.3.0-beta "/tmp/Jack-v0.3.0-beta.dmg" --repo Valerio357/jack --target dev --prerelease --title "Jack v0.3.0-beta" --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## What's New

### Dual Wine Engine Support
- **Apple GPTK \(D3DMetal 3.0\)** — DirectX 11/12 → Metal translation for best UE4/UE5 game compatibility
- **CrossOver Wine** — WineD3D and DXVK renderers for older DirectX 9/10/11 titles
- Per-game engine switcher in Launch Options \(CrossOver ↔ GPTK\)
- Engine switching auto-runs `wineboot` to regenerate correct DLLs
- DXVK automatically disabled when GPTK is selected

### Setup & Dependencies
- GPTK 3.0-3 auto-downloaded and installed during first-run setup
- Both Wine engines installed as required dependencies
- All dependencies checked on launch \(Rosetta, Wine, GPTK, Python, SteamCMD\)

### Previous Improvements \(v0.2.0\)
- Steam Cloud sync \(save upload/download before/after each session\)
- Dedicated Python venv \(fixes PEP 668 on modern macOS\)
- Dynamic Wine username detection for cross-machine cloud sync
- Keychain password prompt eliminated \(Data Protection Keychain\)
- Better error reporting from jacksteam.py

### Known Issues
- Some RE Engine games \(DMC5\) may need windowed mode + DX11 config
- First GPTK launch compiles shaders — may show black screen for up to 2 minutes

---
🐇 Built with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.ai/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add EXPERIMENTAL.md JackGPU/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add JackGPU: Vulkan ICD for virtio-gpu Venus \(GPU paravirtualization\)

Windows Vulkan ICD that enables GPU-accelerated gaming in Windows ARM VMs
on Apple Silicon via the Venus wire protocol:

  Game.exe → DXVK \(DX→Vulkan\) → JackGPU ICD → virtio-gpu → MoltenVK → Metal

Components:
- driver/: Vulkan ICD entry points, dispatch table \(63 functions\), object management
- venus/: Wire format encoder/decoder \(command serialization matching Mesa protocol\)
- transport/: Ring buffer, virtio-gpu communication, D3DKMTEscape \(Win\) + stubs \(macOS\)
- manifest/: Vulkan ICD JSON manifest for Windows loader discovery

Also adds EXPERIMENTAL.md with research notes on online multiplayer,
anti-cheat, GPU paravirtualization approaches on Apple Silicon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
